ocr_findings.description: Page number '420' appears at top-left in image but is rendered mid-document in OCR (line 3). Minor ordering issue, no content lost.
Section label 'クレタリー' (furigana-like label above 関数) in OCR line 11 appears as a floating word; in the image it is small ruby text above the 関数 heading. Cosmetic only.

reviewer_notes: Page is a content page explaining spreadsheet functions (合計関数) with a definition table and formula example. OCR faithfully captured all prose, table rows, and formula syntax. Minor issues: page number placement and ruby text rendered as inline word.
